title: Design Twitter
description: Design a social microblogging platform where users can post short messages, follow accounts, view timelines, and engage with content. The system should support massive fanout, ranking, search, moderation, and real-time updates.
constraints: Serve home timelines with low latency under very high read traffic.
Handle celebrity accounts with extremely large follower counts.
Support posting, deletion, moderation, and search indexing.
